overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through an ancient Egyptian city at night. The character moves from an outer dirt street through a monumental stone gate and into narrow walled alleyways illuminated by torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: outer city street with mud brick buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt road toward the illuminated city gate in the distance

notable_agents.action: civilian in green clothing walking alongside the path
white horse standing near the building facade

entered.detail: traditional egyptian mud brick structure with weathered walls and small windows
large stone gate with multiple arches visible at the end of the street
palm tree lining the left side of the dirt road
low stone wall running along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt road in the outer city at night, passing mud brick buildings and palm trees. A white horse stands near the roadside as the character approaches a distant illuminated gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental stone gate entrance with archways

events.description: passing through the large stone archway into the inner city area
horses with riders pass through the gate opening from the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through the monumental city gate with large stone columns

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback passing through the gate archway
civilian walking toward the gate entrance carrying a basket

entered.detail: large fluted stone column marking the gate entrance with carved details
large metal brazier with burning flames illuminating the gate
red fabric banner hanging from the gate structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the massive stone gate with arches and columns, passing fire braziers and red banners. Horses ride through the gate as the character enters the archway, transitioning from dirt to cobblestone.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walled alleyway between high stone walls

events.description: entering narrow enclosed alleyway with high walls on both sides
character brushes past a pedestrian in the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrow stone alley between high walls with minimal lighting

notable_agents.action: woman in dark dress walking toward the camera in the narrow passage
child running along the right wall in the distance

entered.detail: tall weathered stone wall forming the left boundary of the narrow alley
tall stone wall with rough texture on the right side

segments.scene_description: After passing the gate, the character enters a narrow enclosed alleyway with high stone walls on both sides. The path is dimly lit as the character passes pedestrians in the tight corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled corridor opening to distant city view

events.description: view opens up ahead to reveal distant city buildings and skyline beyond the walls

agents.ego_description: continuing through the walled path toward the open city area with increasing visibility

notable_agents.action: rider on white horse approaching from the distance
civilian walking away on the left side of the path

entered.detail: cluster of buildings and structures visible in the distance beyond the alley end

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the high-walled corridor as the path gradually opens to reveal a distant city skyline. A rider on a white horse approaches from ahead as the alley widens slightly.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rustic outer district into the monumental architecture of an ancient Egyptian city at night. It begins with the character walking along a dirt road lined with mud brick buildings and palm trees, passing a white horse stationed by the roadside. As the character advances toward a distant glow, the scene shifts toward a massive stone gate adorned with arches, columns, and red banners. The camera then glides past flickering fire braziers and riding horses, transitioning from the dusty path into the formal cobblestone interior of the archway.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic stone corridor that gradually opens up to reveal a sprawling city skyline. It begins as the character passes through a monumental gate into a narrow, enclosed alleyway with high stone walls and dim lighting. As the character moves forward, passing pedestrians within the tight corridor, the oppressive walls begin to recede. The scene then expands as the path widens, bringing a rider on a white horse into view from the opposite direction. Finally, the perspective shifts from the enclosed passage to a broad vista, unveiling the distant lights and architecture of the city skyline.
